moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: Race Day
angles.copy: The wait is over, it's race day at Silverstone for the British Grand Prix

angles.name: F1 Season
angles.copy: The 2026 F1 season is in full swing, with the British Grand Prix at Silverstone today

angles.name: Silverstone
angles.copy: One of the most iconic tracks in the world, Silverstone hosts the British Grand Prix today

moments.title: Summer in July
moments.blurb: Summer is in full swing in the UK, with warm weather and long days

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Make the most of the summer weather, with long days and warm nights

angles.name: Outdoor Activities
angles.copy: Get outdoors and enjoy the summer weather, with hiking, biking, or a picnic in the park

angles.name: Summer Events
angles.copy: There are plenty of summer events to enjoy, from music festivals to outdoor concerts

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship takes place at Royal Birkdale from 16-19 July 2026

angles.name: Golf's Biggest Stage
angles.copy: The world's best golfers will gather at Royal Birkdale for The Open Championship

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: One of the most iconic golf courses in the world, Royal Birkdale hosts The Open Championship

angles.name: Golfing Greats
angles.copy: The Open Championship has a rich history of golfing greats, from Nicklaus to Woods

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow from 23 July-2 August 2026

angles.name: Glasgow 2026
angles.copy: The city of Glasgow is ready to host the Commonwealth Games, with athletes from around the world competing

angles.name: Commonwealth Spirit
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are a celebration of sport, culture, and friendship

angles.name: Glasgow's Finest
angles.copy: Glasgow will showcase its finest athletes, venues, and hospitality during the Commonwealth Games

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show takes place from 20-23 July 2026 at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells

angles.name: Agricultural Excellence
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of agriculture, food, and rural life in Wales

angles.name: Wales' Biggest Show
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is the biggest agricultural show in Europe, with something for everyone

angles.name: Welsh Heritage
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a showcase of Welsh heritage, culture, and traditions
